channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: KABOOOOOM RIPPLE JUST DROPPED A MASSIVE BOMBSHELL ON AVAX — 20 replies — 46.1/hr

KABOOOOOM RIPPLE JUST DROPPED A MASSIVE BOMBSHELL ON AVAX

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-04-03 09:58 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62067575
>>62067548
Saaar the banks using mine shitcoin not your tumor weeks and MOAR BANKSSS!

62067613
I fuxking love banks!!

62067644
>>62067613
I am buying cryto because BANKS are so fucking cool doood BOOOOOOM!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62067645
>>62067548
holy shitcoin cringe

62067659
BOOOOOOOOOOM

62068064
garlic really can't handle the bants

62068204
>>62067548
Brad is such a scammer.

62068890
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=llyiQ4I-mcQ

62068935
>>62067548
Bullish
>>62068890
Boomish

62070565
Wait Emin is the fuddie?
Yeets, Turks and babyfaced neckbears, quite the avengers team they got together.

62072352
>>62067548
BOOOOOOOOM

62072624
>>62070565
>Emin is the fuddie?
Yeah, him and Swift.

62072648
>>62067548
Let's check the price movement for both of these
>fucking nothing

62072652
>>62067548
Imagine getting annoyed at April fools teasing

62072687
>>62067548
you know it's pathetic when shit skins make ai images
i hope christ finds you all

62072709
>>62072624

62072712
>>62072624
>>62072709

62072776
>>62072709
>>62072712
>Ripple Treasury enters Swift's partner ecosystem

Ripple Treasury was known as "GTreasury" before Ripple bought it, and it was always part of Swift's partner ecosystem.
How dumb are you.

62072852
>>62067548
>Brad
To think this type of idiot was an exec at Yahoo! during the downfall.
XRP is a grift through and through.

62072861
>>62072712
I love how tards don't understand what a "partnership" means. They seem to think it means a lot more than it actually does.

62071991

62072078

big treasury
fees go to token

item.title: Should I buy more BTC or altcoins? — 38 replies — 48.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Should I buy more BTC or altcoins?

Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-04-03 09:37 UTC

OP

BTC is steady and battle-tested. Altcoins can go up more but are riskier.

>You buying more BTC like Saylor does or alts like ETH and SOL this cycle?

Early replies (first 3)

62059768
I'm going all in on SOL

62059809
>>62059007
Allocating a small portion to CreditScoreProtocol * com can generate substantial wealth

62061375
>>62059768
Why all in on SOL?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62062792
>>62059809
How do you do that?

62065078
>>62061595
But memecoins are also fun depends on your risk tolerance

62065091
>>62059007
BTC is tried and true, it well at least 2, maybe 3x in the nearish future.
Most alts will also 2 or 3x... but some will 5-10x, some even beyond.
If I already had a ton of money I'd just park it in bitcoin for the practical guarantee. I don't, though, so alts it is. Much profit to be rolled back into bitcoin, of course.

62065610
>>62059007
MSTR multiplies well, i made 80% off it last run on 80k ish after taxes didnt catch the bottom tho

62065656
Saylor really needs to be shaken out if bitcoin is to go up further.
>hey, so here's this really cool money that is separated from the state, you can send it anywhere in the world almost instantaneously with no fees and no middleman, and it's finite so it works as digital gold
>the only catch is that some dot com washout now owns 5 percent of the total supply and uses AI-generated videos to lure people into his scammy stocks that offer 11 percent returns
Like who the fuck would want in on this?
>t. 0.33 bitcoin bagholder

62066317
>>62061647
Then dyor

62066485
>>62065091
Btc x10 soon . patience

62066497
>>62065078
Tell me which memecoins to buy. Gimme the next bonk

62066537
>>62066485
Looks like it’s more than that desu. Native BTC staking on Babylon just makes sense if you’re holding. Better than letting it sit there doing nothing. That’s what I’m doing rn.

62066543
>>62061683
when it comes to what?

62066954
>>62066537
Dont trust platforms so easily

62066956
>>62065656
saylor isnt afraid of your shit and baseless fud

62066997
>>62066954
I know, and that’s why I’m so selective with my BTC. This really works for me since it’s fully decentralized and also earning at the same time.

62067000
>>62061733
He's the king of btc my fren

62067162
When pump MSTR saylor?

62067166
>>62059007
>Should I buy more BTC or altcoins?
Probably not

62067204
>>62059007
where we are going we won't need bitchcoins

62067554
>>62066997
getting 1% staking is not good at all

62067657
>>62067204
I need Bitcoin. 100 btc

62069260
>>62067554
It’s a lot better than just holding your BTC with no return. More people should explore how BTCFi works now.

62069267
>>62065091
You're just doing the right thing anon.

62070210
>>62061834
Never heard of that anon

62071949
>>62069260
IF YOU'RE TALKING DEFI. ID GO FOR ETHEREUM AND SOLANA

62071968
Pls stop saylor. Stop

62071975
>>62067166
Do it eyyyyyy

62072569
>>62071949
Yeah ETH and Solana are solid, but only ~1% of BTC is in DeFi. Lots to explore, like Trustless Bitcoin Vaults, which will let BTC earn yield, be used as collateral, or participate in lending. That’s just getting started anon.

62072572
>>62065610
Are you also diversifying?

62072782
>>62059007
>Why nobody is talking xrp?

62072785
>>62067204
zero

62072829
>>62065610

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 238 replies — 35.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 238 • Updated: 2026-04-03 03:40 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62051513
>>62049654
Yes. Define "influencing". What would INFLUENCE YOU? Naked ladies? Hackatons? Drugs? New technical developments? What influences YOU? If I just post something then you'll be like "No, that's not good enough", so what's the actual point if I can't give you EXACTLY what you want?

62051763
>>62051513
From reading the thread I thought you had some intellectual insight, nope an idiot

62051818
>>62051763
>From reading the thread I thought you had some intellectual insight
You tell me what you think is an "intellectual insight"? What would convince you? Throwing a hissy fit and getting emotional at me doesn't really work...

62052015
>>62051763
I'm not sure if I'm making myself clear enough. Define what you think would constitute for something that YOU consider an "intellectual insight" in your own mind? Can you post a piece of information from another chain that amazed you, that made you think, that made you say "Oh shit, this is lit"? I hope I've made myself clear enough good sar.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62056424
>>62051763
100$ end of bull run. Here, some influencing for you.


Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62056570
>>62051763
>>62049654
>>62048939
>>62048708
>>62045442
Here you go. Let me influence you young Vishnus of the mindchain; https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gg4P23PirgU
DOT will become the Web3 cloud. It'll literally be able to do work for ETH, which means it'll be able to scale ETH to millions of TPS. ETH will be able to forward transactions to DOT and DOT will be able to execute them for ETH therefore scaling ETH to millions of TPS. DOT will be able to do that for any arbitrary project (not sure about stuff like BTC and DOGE that has no smart contracts. Maybe that too, yet I can't comment on that because I really don't know at this point).

62056612
>>62056570
>DOT will become the Web3 cloud. It'll literally be able to do work for ETH, which means it'll be able to scale ETH to millions of TPS. ETH will be able to forward transactions to DOT and DOT will be able to execute them for ETH therefore scaling ETH to millions of TPS. DOT will be able to do that for any arbitrary project (not sure about stuff like BTC and DOGE that has no smart contracts. Maybe that too, yet I can't comment on that because I really don't know at this point).
This is JUST one of the possible applications. Of course you'll be able to execute ANY arbitrary operation on-chain, like any Web2 cloud can. Imagine a WHOLE GAME deployed on-chain. Literally every step of your character, every emote, every chat message, every loot drop and pick up being on-chain. You'll of course also be able to run AI agents and shit like that... DOT is the ONLY chain capable of doing MILLIONS of TPS once NOMT + JAM get implemented
NOMT alone will x10 the throughput of the whole DOT chain. https://www.rob.tech/blog/introducing-nomt/ and https://github.com/thrumdev/nomt and https://www.reddit.com/r/Polkadot/comments/1nzjhuq/what_has_happened_to_nomt/ and https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N3BX2eTqpro

So what's getting shipped this year that's considered "influential" for out young Vishnus of the mindchain? JAM, NOMT, the Polkadot App and more stuff (instant unstaking (unstaking will go from 28 days do 1-2 days)), project individuality (proof of personhood that doesn't require KYC, 500ms block (Basti blocks), and more)

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62056623
How do I buy this shit and how long do I hold

62056631
When will you incels realize shitcoins only go up if bitcoin goes up, it doesn’t matter how much ‘bullish’ news a shitcoin gets

62056642
>>62056623
What do you mean "How do I buy this shit"? Bro, if this comes of as mean, it's not meant as mean and I'm sorry if it sounds mean. If you can't figure out how to buy something yourself then please just don't buy it at all. Make yourself a favor

>>62056631
You do realize that this won't be true forever? And that certain projects do decouple from BTC when they're ripe for it.

62056686
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gg4P23PirgU

Oliver makes a really good point here where he tries to point out that like 4 years ago L2s could just exist and people would use them and NOW people are demanding that the L2s upgrade and improve in order to still be considered useful. At this point I would like to add an additional thing. The thing that people want from major L2s (like Arbitrum and AVAX and other stuff like that) is what DOT L2s already have. The major L2s can't compete with DOT because they're behind and once JAM hits they'll be even more behind. In the time DOT gets JAM the L2s won't even have what DOT has RIGHT NOW. DOT has shared security, it has built-in native SAFE bridging (that's not even a bridge, it's a XCM, it uses HRMP channels), because of the shared security it DOES NOT fragment liquidity, you can use the functionality of ANOTHER chain on DOT (so of other DOT chains and other chains in general that aren't on DOT). Once people realize that they can EASILY build on DOT while every other chains LIMITS them in some shape or form they'll start flocking to DOT. Every other chain has a ton of problems that DOT simply DOES NOT therefore DOT is technologically speaking superior. Sooner or later the developers will catch onto it and start developing on DOT since the other chains have limited capabilities. You can only develop humdrum applications on ETH, no innovation will ever come out of ETH ever again. ETH is obselete and unreconcilable. Sure it'll stay relevant for a few more year but how much longer can it stand the test of time? BTC is windows 1.0, ETH is windows 98, DOT is Windows 12 lol (Yes, not Windows 11, it's windows 12).

62056998
>>62056631
The game is changing. This bear market will prove it

62057110
>>62056998
>The game is changing.
What do you see anon? Help us understand what you see when you say "The game is changing". And yes, I do agree that stuff will shift from stupidity back to usability. So, meme coins were the LAST DROP. Enough is ENOUGH. We need to go back to our roots and invest into stuff that actually makes sense and is GROUND BREAKING. If we don't pivot in this liminal time then the industry as a whole will be finished for like 10-20 years UNTIL we pivot there is no way forward. We need to REALIZE that BTC is crap, ETH is crap, SOL is crap, USDT is centralized shit, XRP is useless, TRX is a cult run piece of shit, lol BCH is in the top 10 WTF, DOGE is crap, BNB is fucking crap. It's all just useless junk. Literally the whole of top 10 is fucking garbage that's unusable. It's literally all Windows 1 and Windows 98 type of coins while we already have the Vishnu of the mindchain, the Windows 12 of blockchains, the collectibe 1/9 Lamborghini Veneno Roadster of the blockchain, the fucking Rolls-Royce of the blockchain industry, and we're still stuck with the fucking Windows 1 and Windows 98 of the blockchain industry. Guys, it's time for FUCKING CHANGE. Either we pivot to the 3rd generation blockchains or the whole sector will GO UNDER for a decade or two. Do you want to suck cock for 10 to 20 years? Or do you just market sell your garbage gen 1 and gen 2 tokens/coins and move on with your life and buy the actual technical innovation? It's choice time and it's GOOD to know that any day you can change your whole fucking life. If you want the world to change then the first step to changing the world is to CHANGE YOUR FUCKING SELF. You only need to 1. WANT THE CHANGE and 2. BELIEVE YOU CAN CHANGE (Self-efficacy). Those are the 2 most important principles of BEHAVIOURAL CHANGE. Change your behaviour and with that you'll change the world. Sure it'll take time and effort but hey, even wallowing in your misery, being depressed takes time and effort.

62058962
>>62056631
Algorand is pumping while Bitcoin is dumping because it is quantum secure. Nigger

62059225
DOT will reach the $1.60 range before this week ends

62059268
>>62057110
See was that so hard on being influential?

62060540
>>62059268
The thing is, that "influenced" you... Doesn't mean it influenced the other people. Everyone is a unique little program and therefore needs unique inputs in order to produce the desired output. One man's trash is another man's treasure

>>62058962
Nagger

62060621
100$ end of the FUCKING bull run. Here's some influential and intellectual insights

62060648
>>62060540
How do you know. Besides the intent of you making this thread was to educate/shill/ influence the mass retards on this site, don't try to convince me otherwise

62062169
>>62060648
>How do you know.
What do you mean by that? How do I know what?

62062500
>>62060648
How I know that people are unique little programs and that I need to input unique inputs to get the desired outputs? Is that what you're asking or?

62062550
Let me "influence" you young Vishnus of the MINDchain. Listen to one of our spiritual leaders Oliver Talé-Yaźdi how he talks about the Vishnu mindchain. Join our cult *kmh* *kmh* web3 organization where we talk about the new world order.

https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2039256751346700502

62065568
100$ end of MIND RUN

62068446
12 more hours and the thread will be alive for 30 days and that's when Gavin Wood gives me 11.5k DOT for my "influencing" of your young Vishnus of the mindchain.

62068604
i buy this shit at 6.6$ or -75% from ATH
NOW I M AT -90% DOWN

62068658
>>62068604
yeah the decline of this shit has been remarkable. and it still somehow has a $2 billion market cap.

62069192
>>62068658
im very disappointed

62069282
>>62069192
Good. Now sell so I can GIGA short it some more while shilling it on 4chan. You activated my trap card anon "Backstabbing shill" (Effect: Convince people DOT is THE SOLUTION while having a giga short open at the same time).

62071796
100$ end of bull run. And it's official, the thread has stayed alive for 30 days and therefore Gavin Wood will pay me 11.5k$. That will feed Mumbai for literally a whole year.

Thank you Vishnu

62072073
>>62071796
You're welcome.

Don't I get a little something

item.title: It’s all falling apart — 118 replies — 21.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
It’s all falling apart

Open thread • Replies: 118 • Updated: 2026-04-03 04:59 UTC

OP

At the same time. Bonds dumping, oil spiking, equities crashing

Trump is gonna go down as a worse version of Hoover + LBJ lol

Early replies (first 3)

62068038
>>>/pol/
Trump is not a king
Neither is he responsible for 80 years of BoomerX fuck ups

62068047
>>62068035
it's over

62068065
>>62068038

But he is the closest American president to a king, and the reason we are in this shitshow now. Spiking oil from 60 to 120 in a month is going to rally yields which are going to tighten financial conditions across the country

Tariffs are managed by the legislative, not the executive, but they didn’t stop king Cheeto from wasting a year and dumping markets 20% for being wrong

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62069619
>>62069604
You are really desperate. It did not help your preferred narrative, that the comparison between blue states and red states was so extreme. That's what created the general consensus. Everyone was able to see how fascistic blue states handled the cover up for the 20-22 bail outs

62069635
>>62069619
Brother, you didn’t even have a response to this post >>62069484
I’m not desperate, just bored. Fuck off. I shan’t be entertaining a schizophrenic any longer.

62069663
>>62069614
Less than half. Pretty sure that voting was for land-owners only before Jackson.

62069671
>>62069635
I am not your brother shitskin.
It was plain as day to compare the policies of blue states vs red states thanks to a global instant communication network with 0 barriers of entries for information production and distribution, and it was obvious to see that the left liberal blue states went full fascism while the red states remained free.

So you stupid shitskined shill, what is the rational conclusion from such a comparison? Yes, the left liberals are fascists, dirty socialists that cannot be trusted and ate better hanged yesterday

62069672
>>62069365
>How? He would have had to default on the debt of the past 30 years at the very least day one
Step One: Balance the budget.
Step Two: Keep the budget balanced

62069679
>>62069672
Impossible with 70 years of uncovered ponzi scheming by communists. Again, you cannot hide yourself behind Trump, your fuck ups are not going to be memory holed, you are not going to rise from the ashes and suddenly larp as the adults in the room. The nooses are prepared

62069832
>>62069679
>Impossible with 70 years of uncovered ponzi scheming by communists
I dunno, I think that makes it even easier since you identify all the fraud that ends up being the majority of the deficit spending and then cut it.

62069836
>>62069346
Michigan did the same with nursing homes my Grandmother died of covid after they moved in covid faggots.

62069867
>>62069832
Well it was tried. No matter how much I personally dislike the GenX fag Melon, credit where credit is due trying to root out some scams. But in the end its trying to fix a pipe in a house that is already completely water damaged. Its better to completely demolish it, which means total default.

And again, Trump is just the poor bastard that holds the hot potato that is going to deterministically explode, its ultimately the fault and the generational guilt of GenX, Boomers, Silent Gen and greatest gen, with the latter unfortunately already dead, as their entire set of representatives and "economic" actors that failed for 40 years straight to fix the water damage and instead opened every single tab in the house.

The hate won't go away and its a justified hate, because those bastard generations as a collective imposed a generational contract on those that weren't even born when they scammed. There is only one justified morally and ethically correct way to handle the fuck ups of these generations, genocide. No way around, no mercy. They did not know mercy when they put my name on the deed

62069868
>>62068035
N.E.H

62070088
>>62068437
Amen

62070189
>>62069671

bootlickers like this suck the best cock

62070263
>>62070189
[shill blank]
lol

62070285
The AOC 49 state sweep is going to be a brutal redpill for this country.

62070374
>>62070285
Just because the right is mad at Trump does not mean that they're suddenly going to vote for democrats.

62070388
>>62070374
correct. That's the funny part about demrat shills. They are currently dumping Billions in dollars into eroding the trust in the "state" on such a fundamental level and expecting for some reason that it is going to give them voter potential, when in fact it is just priming the population to go complete 1789 on the entire polity, no matter what flag they fly

62070448
>>62068035
that was always the point, distracting you with manufactured culture wars and financed talking heads while the establishment pulls the plug amidst managed chaos

thanks for playing

62071104
>>62068148
>tariffs (power of purse to congress)
delegated to the president centuries ago
>Iran war (power to declare war to congress)
Delegated to the president nearly a century ago, but the Iraq war involves the Navy and Air Forces, neither of which have ever been subject to congressional declarations of war. The first two barbary wars were fought by the US Navy without a declaration of war by congress, and literally no peeps were made about their constitutionality *by the people who wrote the constitution*. So fuck off with your bullshit.
>threatens to sue political opponents
Oh no not the president that was literally sued by his political opponents! How very gauche of him.
>threatens to sue federal reserve for not lowering rates like we are some 3rd world shithole like turkey
The federal reserve is a patently unconstitutional breach of constutitional executive authority. He should just shut it down.
>fights Supreme Court on tariffs and refuses to refund despite them saying he’s wrong
Separation of powers, bitch. The USSC is not a superior branch to the Administrative.
>uses his military police to literally kill American citizens (ICE)
Oh no police have never killed american citizens before. Perhaps they shouldn't have attempted to murder the ICE officers.
>Donald J. Trump signed 252 Executive orders between 2025 and 2026.
So you're seriously claiming that the president cannot direct the operations of his own executive branch? Because that's what an executive order is, it's an order to the executive branch. That's all it is. It isn't legislation, and you're a fucking retard for thinking it is, or you are just being a lying piece of shit who thinks we are all fucking retards that will fall for it.

62071127
>>62068374
The terms of Article 5 are satisfied by hopes and prayers and warm thoughts. Nobody would care if Estonia did it, but if the US does it then NATO effectively ceases to exist. Oh the piece of paper that the treaty is written on would still exist, and the French and Germans would parade around with their 6 working tanks and half an infantry division between them, for all anybody cares.

62071151
>>62068035
it's just money. they've got a money printer they use regularly for this.

62071160
>>62070448
absolutely. boomer wealth was always going to be fleeced. always.

62071162
>>62070374
They won't vote Democrat. They will vote AOC 2028

62071169
>>62068035
ever!
impossible!
earth shattering!
people asking for their money back is a revolution on par with spitting of the atom.

62071178
>>62071162
Go back to to your shitcord /tv/ clown shill

62071284
>>62068038
Trump was born in 1946 and has been fucking up our society since the beginning with the rest of the boomers. 1946 is the literal leading edge of the boomer generation, retard.

62071296
>>62071162
Unironically Tulsi 2028 if she ends up getting fired.

62071370
>>62071284
Sure, he is a Boomer, and that qualifies him to hang on the same noose BUT it does not mean that the rest of the BoomerX and more important the rest of the polity, bureaucracy, subsidized privates, bankers.... can hide behind him and memory hole themselves out of their guilt. He is not the scapegoat alone, that goes to everyone over 50 in the political sphere and close to it over the past 70 years, no exceptions

62072176
if you actually have any conviction try shorting blue owl, i’ll be happy to have you pay my dividend in may with your WORTHLESS short position.

62072205
>>62068713
>left liberal communist
schizo word salad

62072344
>>62068038
>BoomerX

Is it just the one guy pushing this term?

item.title: Ripple is attending SIBOS 2026 — 24 replies — 17.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Ripple is attending SIBOS 2026

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-04-03 09:03 UTC

OP

Its literally over for stinkers.

Ripple Treasury is officially attending Swift Sibos 2026. While the world talks about the future of finance, Ripple is building it. Ripple will be showcasing how XRP and Ripple are transforming global liquidity.

BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!!!

Early replies (first 3)

62062798
>>62062758
KA-BOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62062809
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!!!!

62063021
Hasn’t Chainlink attended this shit like 5 times

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62063062
>>62062758
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62063071
>>62063021
Not once. What makes you think that?

62063133
>>62062758
KABOOOOOOOOOOOM!!

62063231
why did you crop out the last paragraph?

62063237
>>62063231
>but will sell hot dogs from a cart in an adjacent parking lot
so bullish @ this

62063358
>>62063231
gotta get me some of them hotdogs

62063538
>>62062758
WE'RE GONNA BE INSIDE THE BUILDING

BOOOOOOOOOOOM

62063544
>>62063237
I love hot dogs!!?

BOOOOOOOOOOOOM!

62063629
>>62063021
yes that's the joke, they bent the knee after their last ditch effort featuring chef boyardee

62063655
>>62063231
kek

62063878
>>62063231
KEK

62066644
>>62062758
BOOOOOOOM

62066692
linkies get cuckolded again :}
oh it feels me with sooo much sexual pleasure when that happens :}

62066790
>>62063655
This meme was made with indian hands

62066826
>>62063231
First qnt now ripple. What happend to the multichain future ?
Payment abstraction ? 0
The reserve ? Under water
CCIP ? Taco stand revenue
Shills fishy, clg? Rattled, impotent and seething
Linkies? Disgruntled, sucked dry, lashing out
Their memes? Like their investment, futile and worthless

62071087
>>62063231
there are actually retarded ass stinkies that will believe this

62072358
>>62062758
BOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62072601
>>62062758
>exhibitor
In other words: they paid for a booth on the exhibition floor, like literally anyone can do.

>>62063021
Chainlink has been invited to speak at pretty much every Sibos since 2017.

62072753
>>62062758

>WE'RE GOING TO REPLACE SWIFT
To
>we're getting a booth at swift
BOOOM!

62072762
>>62072753
>chainlinks main advocate at swift is "stepping down"
>ripple joins swift partner program

KEEEEEEEEEEK

62072783
>>62072762
>>chainlinks main advocate at swift
You mean Ehrenfeld?

>>ripple joins swift partner program
Ripple bought a company that was already part of the swift partner program.

62059640

62059646
>>62059282
I live in a shithole commie-block with thin walls (in America). I'm forced to hear my neighbors having sex. But I return the favor by having this one nerdy/emo/gamer black chick come over and I fuck her in the room right above their bedroom and make them listen to it for hours.

Fuck those assholes.

62059744
>>62059262

62059784
>>62059331

62059801

Am I winning? I always just sat in my room and played video games anyways

62059944
>>62059801

is that an euphemism for leeching off from your friends? are you jewish? you sound jewish

62059963
>>62059293
land is nice. chickens and a garden never have to buy food again

62060057

62060351

62060830

62060843
>>62059262
Homeowners get instant sex with women.

62060879
>>62059801

So you spend your entire peak-adult life living with others like a teenager?

At that fucking point why dont you just rent your house out and live with ur parents

Jesus Christ some of you are Fucking RETARDED

62060932
>>62060843
Lol, or you can just be tall amd White. I get all the Black, Latina and SEA pussy I want.

>>62060879

>nooooooo you have to grow up and live a boring life like the rest of us!!!!! Reeeeeee!!!

62061045
>>62059262

62061047
>>62059262

62061153
>>62060932

62061353

62061836

62061877

62069386

62070412

item.title: Going to Pattaya after being laid off? — 15 replies — 10.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Going to Pattaya after being laid off?

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-04-03 08:57 UTC

OP

33
House fully paid
Will be terminated in July 2026
120K in savings
No career (only issue here)

After 5 years being a good goy i got laid off and my contract will stop in July 2026

Should I allow myself 2-3 months in Pattaya to relax or should I "careermax" trying to get a new job immediately?

Resume gap I don't really care because a friend can say i work for his company during this time

im a junior cloud engineer (yes at 33 lol) and would like to get a certification like AZ-104 to be able to be hired as a Cloud engineer or Senior Cloud engineer when i come back home after that

What do you think?

PS: My gf is being very annoying about that but Im ready to go without her if she keeps nagging, FYI she is 100% remote and Pattaya is a comfy place if you stay away from naughty areas

Early replies (first 3)

62070612
>>62070405
https://youtu.be/sbcZzT8CExA

62070641
>>62070612
Yes this town

62070857
>>62070405
>Pattaya is a comfy place
no, its gross

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62072002
Why Tailand?
Are you gay?

62072021
>>62070405
Sell house and just retire in Thailand.
I know its easier said than done. I fully own my home too and think about doing this all the time but never pulled the trigger and I just keep getting older. :/

62072028
>>62072002
You know not everyone is a ladyboy in thailand right? Also, there are no shortage of real women in thailand because there is a defecit of men because alot turn into gays and ladyboy.

62072060
>>62072028
theres no ladies in your city?

62072131
kill your gf and then yourself

62072511
>>62070405
34 year old pattaya veteran here. 200 bodies, countless creampies

Do it. Go fuck some 19 year old teens raw

62072541
having a "gf" over 30 is cringe, I hope you charger her rent

62072561
>>62070405
You should do it. Thailand is awesome. Go out to Phangnah on a boat trip.
Also a few months resume gap ain't shit. I was unemployed almost 2 years as a senior cybersecurity professional and got hired at more pay at a big bank finally.

62072697
>>62072511
thai shemales are more attractive than thai monkey women

I have + 300 bodycount of white women

you are disgusting man, gtfo of this thread

62072743
>>62072541
>after 30 you must fall for the marriage jew

go fuck yourself rebecca

62072766
>>62072697
i suppose you can find more than enough ladyboys in every popular tourist spot in thailand? not just pattaya?

62072771
>>62072697
>guys im going to pattaya (the most depraved place on earth) but not to fuck the women i swear

there is no hype and no demand. no community ,

OP

Together, they’re combining global payment rails with stablecoin-enabled settlement to improve speed, liquidity, and reliability.

62061409

62061530
>>62057451

62062460
>>62058935
>>62057468
These niggers cant google KEEEK

Originally known as Western Union Business Solutions before its 2021 acquisition, Convera reported over USD 190 billion in turnover in 2025 and serves more than 26,000 businesses worldwide. Headquartered in Seattle, it employs 1,001-5,000 people and focuses on tech-driven solutions for FX, compliance, and risk management.

62055163
>>62054909

62055248
>>62054306
My nigga shkreli isn't a jew

62055660
>>62053587
If they were real girls and occasionally said they loved and were proud of me in between telling me to buy $STRC, this would work on me.
t. khhv who spends all his income on OF, ASMR, and Twitch streamers and would die for Israel or whatever if they got a qt to tell me she needed me to. Luckily they haven't figured out how extreme a simp I am.

62055692
>>62053587
>another crypto rug pull
>11% yield
No thanks I can bleed money, have tech exposure and still get 11% with JEPQ

62055828
>>62053587

62055962
>>62055828
At the very least it would have to wait until the republicans are out of office so the SEC can be refunded and directed to do their job again

62056339
We literally have a scammer using AI females to catch simps to give him money to leverage buy bitcoin

This is not gonna end well

62057831
>>62055660
Bro do nofap or something, this is no way to exist

62059850
>>62057831
>>62055660
Or just get a practice gf or fwb (its easier than you think) to get that energy out. You get more positive energy rebound that way.

62059950
>>62053647
I don't agree with his drug price gouging despite his copes, but I don't really care because he gives out a lot of interesting information. His sycophants are degenerate though lol.

62059975
>>62053587
anything shkreli says is bad, is good.

62060091
>>62054079
How?

62060099
>twitter screenshot thread

62061010
>>62059850
>practice gf
I consider this deeply immoral.
>fwb
I'm not sure I would be able to resist falling in love with her.
>>62057831
>nofap
It wouldn't help much I don't think. It might even make it worse for a bit.

62061053
This dipshit makes me want to sell my BTC so bad. Can't believe how retarded he is.

62061149
>>62053587
A criminal calling out another criminal? What is this, criminalception?

62061255
>>62053660
Kicked dog syndrome. Dumb goys have been abused so long they dont even know what decent treatment looks like. Its perfectly normal to give someone 100% of your money, let them lend it out for free, then hoard 94-99% of the profit for themselves.

62061323
>>62053587
that's like d grade rates

62061414
Shabbat shalolm

62061447
Rents due.

62062037
>>62061010
Practice gf is a soft euphemism, but yes I agree doing that on purpose would be immoral
>couldn't resist falling in live w fwb
That is a legitimate trap, and good on you for being honest w yourself about it. It takes a certain amount of heartbreak and cynicism to really get there. The point of the comment was that you need to just get a bad relationship out of the way so you have a far better idea of what you want.
>nofap would be worse
It is worse for approximately 10 days. A lot worse. You'll relapse many times before you hit that mark. You still should try it anyway as an exercise in discipline. This sounds difficult to believe with your current mindset, but after 3 to 4 weeks you don't even think about masturbation anymore except as a novelty

62062196
>>62053587
I don't want to like Saylor but everytime I see a jew kvetching because of him it makes me want to buy his stock.

62066982
>>62062196
This, I'm not touching Saylor's products but when BTC rips to 1m+ he will have like 1m Bitcoin and be worth over 1 trillion dollars.
He's an autistic adult gaming the entire financial system and he's probably going to win.

You know the jews want to liquidate him, but he's probably positioned just slightly better than coinbase.

62066996
MARTIN SHKRELI REDEMPTION ARC

62067553
to be fair STRC actually looks pretty good. surprised its still hodling up.

62070242
>>62054909
>si?=
kys.

62070279
>>62053587
He's such a fkn genius. I mean it.
Had I understood that and his mind sooner, I could have bought apple for peanuts. He literally told the world you're an idiot if you don't see Apple coming.

62070291
>>62053779
kek

62071780
>>62053587

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-04-03 04:34 UTC

OP

62070725
>>62070715
well let me put it this way:
why would link EVER PUMP EVER AGAIN!!??!?!?!
fuckin stupid ass stinkbag

62070738
why did you crop out the full post?
>I'm not retiring. I saw something.
>I'm leaving to join a team of scientists and entrepreneurs building at the intersection of Frontier AI, scientific discovery and institutional finance. Researchers from Oxford, Harvard and Cambridge. Engineers from SpaceX, Google and Uber.
>More to come. But the reason I left the best job I've ever had is simple: this is what comes next and I had to join the team building it.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62070746
>>62070725
swift is working with xrp so i don't understand why this guy leaving has any impact on link

62070748
>>62070698

62070767
the fired him for trying to pump his link bags
this announcement is just so they can all save face

62070819
>>62070698
> will you sell now?! finally???

62070843
>>62070819
good. we want you to suffer, stinkbag

62070876
>>62070843

62071007
>>62070876

62071018
>>62071007

62071025

62071058

>DUDE YOU CAN USE IT TO BUY DRUGS

62072172

62072621
>>62068413

62072663
It's gonna crab at 67 until the alphas have a new meme number then it will dump to zero and I'll go redeem my blowjobs from michael saylor

62072675
The vast majority of people only care about an asset when it's making big moves. That's the whole reason why the cycle happens, blow off tops happen due to a crescendo of hype and hysteria, followed by a loss of faith and a scramble for the door. Markets are a social game, the point is to buy before the hype.

item.title: >Choose Life. Choose a job. Choose a career. Choose a family. Choose a fucking big television, choose washing machines,… — 40 replies — 3.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
>Choose Life. Choose a job. Choose a career. Choose a family. Choose a fucking big television, choose washing machines,…

Open thread • Replies: 40 • Updated: 2026-04-02 23:54 UTC

OP

>Choose Life. Choose a job. Choose a career. Choose a family. Choose a fucking big television, choose washing machines, cars, compact disc players and electrical tin openers. Choose good health, low cholesterol, and dental insurance. Choose fixed interest mortgage repayments. Choose a starter home. Choose your friends. Choose leisurewear and matching luggage. Choose a three-piece suit on hire purchase in a range of fucking fabrics. Choose DIY and wondering who the fuck you are on Sunday morning. Choose sitting on that couch watching mind-numbing, spirit-crushing game shows, stuffing fucking junk food into your mouth. Choose rotting away at the end of it all, pissing your last in a miserable home, nothing more than an embarrassment to the selfish, fucked up brats you spawned to replace yourselves. Choose your future.

>Choose life... But why would I want to do a thing like that? I chose not to choose life. I chose somethin' else. And the reasons? There are no reasons. Who needs reasons when you've got heroin?

Early replies (first 3)

62060931
do heroin addicts really think theyre above normies

62060938
>>62060923
is this some quote from a book. I dont get it frogposter

62060941
>>62060938
I think it's song lyrics

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62061102
I choose the president is trump! You can cope.

62061112
The Zone is a very complicated system of traps, and they're all deadly. I don't know what goes on here when people are absent, but the moment someone shows up, everything comes into motion. Old traps disappear and new ones emerge. Safe spots become impassable. One minute your path is easy, the next it's hopelessly convoluted. That's the Zone. It may seem capricious, but it is what we've made it with our condition. I've seen people stop halfway and go back. Some of them even died on the very threshold of the Room. But everything that happens here depends not on the Zone, but on us!
>So it lets the good ones pass and kills the bad ones?
I don't know... I think it lets those pass who have lost all hope. Not good or bad, but miserable people. But even the most miserable will die if they don't know how to behave. You were lucky. It only gave you a warning.

62061404
>>62061075
The protagonist chooses to live his life instead of escaping with heroin. It IS a wholesome twistereno ending my goy

62061531
>>62061404
Ah frick...fuck movies

62061559
>>62060923

62061566
>>62060931
>Are you happy? I am, man
>Content and fully aware
>Money, status, nothing to me
'
>Cause your life is empty and bare, yeah
>You can't understand a user's mind
>But try with your books and degrees
>If you let yourself go and opened your mind
>I'll bet you'd be doing like me
>And it ain't so bad
Yes

62061642
>>62061559
>choose life

62061743
>>62061559
see how the skin is much dark around the anus and pussy
the cause is a lifetime worth of poopstains

62061764
>>62060923
choose being gay with your dad.

62061998
>>62061743
no it's because puberty turns the skin darker

62062073
>>62061998
no its because of poop you fucking retard

62062076
>>62060923
>.... but who cares when you've got /smg/?

62062080
>>62061074
>>62061075
I like the way Porno ends vs the end of T2 but both are great in their own right.

62062113
It's probably good I'm not rich or else I would totally just do drugs all day

62062117
>>62060923
Ees2Gud1!

62062272
>>62061073
Seems redundant to own two dishwashers.

62062301
>>62061112
I watched Stalker at the very end of a LSD trip. It was absolutely amazing.

62062410
>>62061057
>>62060923
Great movie. Kinda makes being a piece of shit look fun, ngl, but I know in reality that lifestyle is actually fucking horrible

62062423
>>62060923
Trannyspotting?

62062431
>>62060931
they are

62062434
>>62062410
The lifestyle is based, self destruction is based. Only real shrigmas get it. So sick of moralfags and their cookiecutter ways. Laying in a ditch dying is based would do it again no questions asked.

62062435
>>62060941

62062857
>>62062434
Lol
I had a friend who likes that lifestyle. I remember he told me once "rock bottom is a challenge for me". He is a fucked up dude, reminded me of the Savage from Brave New World, he lived like some kinda drug addicted modern savage man

62062916
>>62061559

62062933
>>62062410
>but I know in reality that lifestyle is actually fucking horrible

It's really not that bad. Hanging out with your mates everyday getting high on heroin whilst being financially supported by the tax payer.

62062983
>>62062857
Obviously its a less than ideal scenario but that being said, drugs are cool kids, degeneracy is based.

62062996
>>62060923
This is the male version of that webm where the woman is about to get married but gets cold feet and instead fucks a bunch of random men.

62067353
>>62061559
hnnngggg

62071330
>>62061559
sending 5 sol to anyone providing sauce, unironically

62071363
>>62071330
